subject: KACC Nov 14 fair recap - two paragraphs for Q1 board packet
body:
Hye-jin,

[Paragraph 1] Booth-and-counseling recap: 197 booth visitors, 4 one-on-one counseling sessions, 300 handouts moved. Gestational-diabetes handouts sold out by 2 PM. Two follow-up visits converted to December Brigham OB appointments.

[Paragraph 2] Structural notes for next year: handout table position needs 8 more feet from entrance for flow; Korean-language signage lettering should be 20% larger; counseling curtain material needs sound-dampening upgrade.

Katie Lee
Brigham OB/GYN booth lead, KACC Nov 14 fair
